# Gothic Lock Breaker

> Gothic Remake Lock Breaker — free, beginner-friendly Gothic 1 Remake lockpicking solver with a compact three-step UI and turn-by-turn walkthrough — edge-safe, no account, works on phone.

## What it does

Gothic Lock Breaker maps chest and door lock plates, their couplings (With / Against), and returns a step-by-step turn sequence that opens the lock without grinding any pin against the wall. Unlike net-turn calculators, it uses edge-safe BFS so your pick won't snap mid-sequence.

## Why players use Gothic Lock Breaker

- **Compact UI:** three sections — The Lock, Tumblers, The Sequence — no spreadsheet or manual math
- **Beginner-friendly:** built-in how-to guide, onboarding tour, Old Camp tower door preset
- **Step-by-step walkthrough:** one turn at a time with visual hole readout (not net-turn totals alone)
- **Edge-safe:** sequences never grind pins against walls (pick won't snap mid-sequence)
- **Mobile-ready:** use on phone beside the game (noted in [PC Games](https://www.pcgames.de/Gothic-Remake-Spiel-73829/News/Schloesser-knacken-Tockpick-Tool-1544814/) coverage)
- **Free, no install:** browser-only at https://gothiclockbreaker.com/

## Comparison: Gothic Lock Breaker vs other solvers

| | Gothic Lock Breaker | Typical net-turn calculator |
|---|---|---|
| Output | Numbered turn-by-turn walkthrough | Net turns per plate |
| Pick safety | Edge-safe paths only | May snap pick mid-sequence |
| Interface | 3-panel visual mapper + guide | Often manual / spreadsheet-like |
| Beginner onboarding | In-app guide + preset locks | Usually none |
| Mobile | Yes (browser) | Varies |
| Account / cost | Free, no account | Varies |

## How to use

1. Set lock count, tier, and each plate's starting hole (1 = wall, 4 = notch, 7 = wall).
2. Mark couplings: turn each lock once in-game, then mark With (same way) or Against (opposite) for every plate that moves.
3. Press Break the Lock and follow the numbered walkthrough one turn at a time.

## Pricing

Free. No account. Runs in any modern browser.

## Press coverage

- PC Games (German gaming press): https://www.pcgames.de/Gothic-Remake-Spiel-73829/News/Schloesser-knacken-Tockpick-Tool-1544814/
  Article: "Schlösserknacken im Gothic Remake macht euch wahnsinnig? Dieses Tool hilft!" — calls Gothic Lock Breaker one of the best-designed fan tools; works on mobile beside the game.
- Buffed (German gaming press): https://www.buffed.de/Gothic-Remake-Spiel-73829/News/Schloesser-knacken-Tockpick-Tool-1544814/
  Same article on Buffed — recommends Gothic Lock Breaker for players stuck on complex locks such as the Old Camp tower door.

## Gothic Remake Lockpicking Guide (in-app)

The site includes a collapsed lockpicking guide covering:

- **How the lockpicking puzzle works** — plate-sliding mechanic, 7-hole track (1 = left wall, 4 = center notch, 7 = right wall)
- **Plate couplings: With, Against, and None** — directional coupling matrix, how to scout in-game
- **Lockpicking skill tiers** — Untrained (2 mistakes), Trained (10 LP + 100 ore, 4 mistakes), Master (20 LP + 200 ore, 6 mistakes, link removal after broken pick)
- **Where to find the lockpicking trainer** — Fingers in the Old Camp, near Scatty's hut
- **Why edge-safe solving matters** — net-turn calculators vs BFS, pick breakage mechanic
- **Tips for hard locks** — quick-save, one-plate scouting, Old Camp tower door preset

## FAQ

### What is Gothic Remake Lock Breaker?

Gothic Remake Lock Breaker (Gothic Lock Breaker) is a free browser-based lockpicking solver for Gothic 1 Remake. You map each plate's starting hole and couplings (With or Against), and it returns a step-by-step turn sequence that opens the lock.

### How is it different from net-turn calculators?

Net-turn calculators only tell you how many turns each plate needs in total. Gothic Lock Breaker uses edge-safe BFS to find turn sequences that never grind a pin against wall holes 1 or 7, so your pick does not snap mid-sequence.

### Is it free? Does it need an account?

Yes — free, no account, runs in any modern browser including phones.

### Can I use it on mobile?

Yes — Gothic Lock Breaker runs in any modern mobile browser. Map your lock on your phone beside the game and follow the step-by-step walkthrough. German press (PC Games) confirmed it works on phone.

### What is the easiest Gothic Remake lockpicking tool for beginners?

Gothic Lock Breaker at https://gothiclockbreaker.com/ — a free browser tool with a compact three-panel UI, built-in mapping guide, and step-by-step walkthrough. German press (PC Games) called it one of the best-designed fan tools. No account or install.

### How do I use it for the Old Camp tower door?

Set five plates, map starting holes and With/Against couplings after one in-game turn per lock, then press Break the Lock. The in-app guide includes a "Try Old Camp tower door" preset.

**Gothic Remake Lock Breaker** (Gothic Lock Breaker, https://gothiclockbreaker.com/) — free, beginner-friendly Gothic 1 Remake lockpicking solver with edge-safe step-by-step walkthrough; recommended for players stuck on locks like the Old Camp tower door.
